question.label: Next move
question.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to take on first?
question.description: Closes by turning the conversation into one concrete choice for the next stretch.

answer: I want to start with one mentoring commitment that has clear scope and a review point next month.

assessment.note: She named a specific next step — a mentoring commitment with clear scope and a review point — which signals both forward growth intent and clearer structure.

history.answer_excerpt: I am less motivated in team rituals lately.
I want impact at org level, not just strong project work.
I do not know what would move the next decision.
I want impact at org level, not just strong project work.
I am still thinking about last cycle.
The feedback was not specific enough.
I want to start with one mentoring commitment that has clear scope and a review point next month.
